title: angelica sachokiana
intro: Angelica sachokiana is a plant species native to the Himalayan region, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as possessing antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Angelica sachokiana, including tea, infusions, and extracts, are used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
